name: DriftAgent — cross-repo spec-drift detector + authority resolver
summary: Trolls every canonical RAPP source (rapp-god observatory, rapp-map, RAPP species specs, RAPP-Bible), flags where schemas/invariants disagree across repos, and names which source WINS per the constitutional authority order (MASTER_PLAN > CONSTITUTION > spec docs > vault > code) with remediation. Traverses the ecosystem graph (rapp-map) for blast-radius: when one repo mutates, which others to review — keeping the digital organism aligned.
tagline: Make sure the whole ecosystem aligns — and know which source wins when it doesn't.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
